pokemon:grapploct.name: Grapploct
pokemon:grapploct.summary: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.
A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.

pokemon:clobbopus.name: Clobbopus
pokemon:clobbopus.summary: Its tentacles tear off easily, but it isn’t alarmed when that happens—it knows they’ll grow back. It’s about as smart as a three-year-old.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its tentacles tear off easily, but it isn’t alarmed when that happens—it knows they’ll grow back. It’s about as smart as a three-year-old.
It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its tentacles tear off easily, but it isn’t alarmed when that happens—it knows they’ll grow back. It’s about as smart as a three-year-old.
